title: Torchier Torches Continued
description: Gives all the torches in the game the new Redstone Torch outline from Snapshot 24w33a.
body:
It's an updated version of [Torchier Torches by creep](https://modrinth.com/project/beuIkbn5) (imo the best variant of a pack with updated torch model) for 1.21.9+.

**I added a new texture for the copper torch.**

![torches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33a2f02ec05cbfb1ffc4885a4faa4314bc62f7dc.png)

---
